resources.string: Admin access deactivated, Now uninstall from setting/apps

This app uses the (Monitor screen unlock attempts) DEVICE ADMIN PERMISSION to detect wrong attempt in your phone. Click activate button to start capturing the person who unlock your phone when you are not around.

Increase the number of threads used

Increasing threshold of detected object results button

Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
Are you sure you want to delete?

Record video in the background without interruptions, even while using other apps.
Instructions for searching hidden camera inside bathroom:
● Behind or inside decorative items like mirrors, picture frames, or wall art.
● Inside air vents or exhaust fans.
● Inside light fixtures or electrical outlets.
● On the ceiling or in the corners of the room.
8) Ensure Privacy: If you find a hidden camera, ensure your privacy is protected. Remove the camera, disconnect it, or cover it to prevent further unauthorized surveillance.
5) Check for Audio Recording Devices: In addition to cameras, consider the possibility of hidden audio recording devices. Look for small microphones or audio recording equipment in the room.

4) Inspect Mirrors and Reflective Surfaces: Some hidden cameras can be concealed behind mirrors or reflective surfaces. Examine these surfaces closely for any anomalies, such as tiny holes or irregularities.
1) Visual Inspection: Begin by conducting a thorough visual inspection of the bathroom. Pay close attention to areas where a camera could be discreetly hidden, such as:

7) Consult a Professional: If you have strong suspicions but cannot locate any hidden cameras on your own, it\'s advisable to consult with a professional who specializes in security or counter-surveillance. They can use specialized equipment to thoroughly sweep the room.
6) Use Your Smartphone: Some smartphone apps are designed to detect hidden cameras by analyzing the room for unusual infrared emissions. You can download such apps and use them to scan the area.

3) Use a Camera Detector: If you have access to a camera detector or bug detector, use it to scan the bathroom. These devices can detect the presence of hidden cameras or transmitting signals. Follow the manufacturer\'s instructions for best results.
2) Check for Unusual Objects: Look for any unusual or out-of-place objects in the bathroom. Cameras can be disguised as everyday items, so pay attention to items that seem new or unfamiliar.
Instructions for searching hidden camera inside bedroom:
● Behind or inside decorative items like photo frames or wall art.
● In small holes or gaps in the walls, ceilings, or furniture.
● Among electronic devices or their components.

8) Consult a Professional: If you have strong suspicions but cannot locate any hidden cameras on your own, it\'s advisable to consult with a professional who specializes in security or counter-surveillance. They can use specialized equipment to thoroughly sweep the room.

5) Scan for Unusual Lights: Turn off the lights and look for any unusual glows or LED lights that might indicate the presence of a hidden camera. Many cameras have small indicator lights that could give them away.
4) Inspect Mirrors and Reflective Surfaces: Some hidden cameras can be concealed behind one-way mirrors or reflective surfaces. Examine these surfaces closely for any anomalies.
9) Ensure Privacy: If you find a hidden camera, ensure your privacy is protected. Remove the camera, disconnect it, or cover it to prevent further unauthorized surveillance.
1) Visual Inspection: Begin by conducting a thorough visual inspection of the bedroom. Pay close attention to objects or areas where a camera could be discreetly hidden, such as:
7) Use Your Smartphone: Some smartphone apps are designed to detect hidden cameras by analyzing the room for unusual infrared emissions. You can download such apps and use them to scan the area.
6) Look for Audio Recording Devices: In addition to cameras, consider the possibility of hidden audio recording devices. Check for small microphones or audio recording equipment in the room.

3) Use a Camera Detector: If you have access to a camera detector or bug detector, use it to scan the room. These devices can detect the presence of hidden cameras or transmitting signals. Follow the manufacturer\'s instructions for best results.
2) Check for Unusual Wires: Look for any suspicious or out-of-place wires or cables that could lead to a hidden camera. Be cautious and avoid tampering with electrical wiring.
Permission to access the device camera is necessary for capturing an intruder\'s image when an incorrect password is entered.
Camera permission is permanently denied. Please enable it in app settings to continue.
This app needs the Camera permission to function properly. Please grant it in the next prompt or enable it in the app settings.
Instructions for searching hidden camera inside changing room:
● Around the hooks, shelves, or any fixtures.
● Behind or inside clothing racks or hangers.

8) Alert Others: If you have suspicions of a hidden camera in a changing room, first, ensure your safety and the privacy of others. Quietly inform other individuals using the changing room to be discreet and avoid changing until the situation is resolved.

5) Consult Management: If you are in a commercial establishment, inform the management or staff about your suspicions immediately. They should address the situation promptly and may involve law enforcement if necessary.

4) Inspect Mirrors and Reflective Surfaces: Some hidden cameras can be concealed behind mirrors or reflective surfaces. Examine these surfaces closely for any anomalies, such as small holes or irregularities.
1) Visual Inspection: Begin by conducting a visual inspection of the changing room. Pay close attention to areas where a camera could be hidden, such as:

7) Report to Authorities: If you discover a hidden camera in a changing room, it is essential to report it to the appropriate authorities, such as the police, as this is a serious breach of privacy and may be illegal.
6) Ensure Privacy: If you find a hidden camera, ensure your privacy and the privacy of others are protected. Do not tamper with the camera, but discreetly cover it or move away from its view.

3) Use a Camera Detector: If you have access to a camera detector or bug detector, use it to scan the changing room discreetly. These devices can detect the presence of hidden cameras or transmitting signals. Follow the manufacturer\'s instructions for best results.

2) Check for Unusual Objects: Look for any unusual or out-of-place objects that could be disguising a camera. Hidden cameras in changing rooms are typically designed to blend in with the surroundings.
Check internet connection and try again
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Deactivate admin access then uninstall it
Delay a milliseconds to wait before taking a pictures
Are you sure you want to delete all images ?
Move the app near suspicious objects; a beep or higher readings may signal a wired camera.
We require permission to access the device storage to save a selfie of the intruder.
Do you want to enable logging?
For a better user experience, please select the first option in the camera permissions: \'Allow only while using the app.
if you spot a white light on your screen, which is invisible to the naked eye, is infrared light.
If someone enters an incorrect PIN or PASSWORD
Press the Third Eye button to view the intruder pictures
They Attempt to unlock your phone
Capture photos using the front camera when an incorrect PIN or pattern is entered on your lock screen.
It will take some time to monitor unlock attempts
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
A picture will be only taken if this many attempts have failed
Если закрыть рекламу до окончания таймера, награда за просмотр не будет начислена

Огромный выбор авто. Удобный поиск. Авто новые и с пробегом. Ежедневные обновления. Огромный выбор авто. Огромный выбор авто. Удобный поиск. Авто новые и с пробегом. Ежедневные обновления. Огромный выбор авто
Покупка и продажа элитных и дешёвых машин на Авто.ру
Есть противопоказания. Обратитесь к специалисту Есть противопоказания. Обратитесь к специалисту
Move phone closer to the suspected device

Tap to switch to year view
Your device lacks the capability to detect electromagnetic sensors. Please use a different device to measure radiation.
Without granting this permission, you won\'t be able to capture a photo of the intruder after a wrong attempt.
Notification Permission is required in order to receive alert when an intruder is captured
Allow app to send you notifications?
Number of pictures taken for each detection
An object detector is an AI system that finds and labels objects in images or videos.
Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.
You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.
Instructions for searching hidden camera outside room:
● Around the door frame or entrance.
● In corners of the building\'s exterior.
● Among foliage, trees, or landscaping near the room.

8) Ensure Privacy: If you find a hidden camera, ensure your privacy is protected. If it\'s on your property, you have the right to remove it. If it\'s in a public space, contact local authorities and report the situation.
5) Search for Audio Recording Devices: Consider the possibility of hidden audio recording devices as well. Look for microphones or audio recording equipment placed outside the room.
4) Inspect Lighting Fixtures: Check outdoor lighting fixtures, such as security lights, for any unusual or additional components that may be cameras or recording devices.
1) Visual Inspection: Start by conducting a visual inspection of the exterior of the room. Look for any areas where a camera could be hidden or mounted, such as:

7) Consult a Professional: If you have strong suspicions but cannot locate any hidden cameras on your own, it\'s advisable to consult with a professional who specializes in security or counter-surveillance. They can use specialized equipment to thoroughly sweep the area.

6) Use Your Smartphone: Some smartphone apps are designed to detect hidden cameras by analyzing the surroundings for unusual infrared emissions. You can download such apps and use them to scan the area.

3) Use a Camera Detector: If you have access to a camera detector or bug detector, use it to scan the area outside the room. These devices can detect the presence of hidden cameras or transmitting signals. Follow the manufacturer\'s instructions for best results.
2) Check for Unusual Objects: Pay attention to any unusual or out-of-place objects or equipment near the room. Cameras may be disguised as everyday items or outdoor fixtures.
This permission allow an app to display on top of other apps. Background video recorder required overlay permission to record video.
This permission is required in order to record audio while recording background video.
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions. Open the app settings screen to modify app permissions.

Delay in milliseconds to wait before taking a picture. Setting this value to less than 1000(1 second) may cause a black picture.If you get black pictures,increase this value.

If checked,picture will be saved to Gallery (other apps will be able to see them), if not, they will be stored in the app itself (no other apps can see them)

This app needs the Storage permission to function properly. Please grant it in the next prompt or enable it in the app settings.

This subscription gives you unlimited access to our app content library.Payment is charged through the google play store upon purchase.It will automatically renew before the end of the current period of your subscriptions and you can also turn off auto-renewal from your google play store account settings.
This device doesn\'t support Camera2 API.
Third Eye won\'t work properly without these permissions.
This app needs camera access to detect objects. Please grant camera permission to continue.
This app needs the Camera permission. Please enable it in the app settings.
This app needs the Storage permission. Please enable it in the app settings.
To Detect infrared camera move your phone to suspected device if you spot a green or blue light on your screen, which is invisible to naked eye, is infrared light and it is a may be infrared camera
Watching an ad will grant you access to playback the recorded video

We do not collect personal information from any user. “Personal information” is private. All data what making from this app will save on your device. This app never backup or upload data or any users.
Your feedback is valuable to us
